result.stderr:
coveralls.net 2.1.0
Copyright ©  2015

  -f, --pattern         File name search pattern ('*' for wildcards)

  -p, --parser          Parser to use (Currently supports OpenCover, Cobertura
                        and AutoDetect)

  -d, --debug           Debug mode. WILL PRINT SENSITIVE DATA

  --opencover           Use the OpenCover Parser

  --cobertura           Use the Cobertura Parser

  --recursive           Search directories recursively.

  --autodetect          Use the AutoDetect Parser (chooses parser based on input
                        file)

  -s, --full-sources    (Default: false) Send full sources instead of the digest

  -r, --repo-token      

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.

  value pos. 0
